items.caption: A yellow legal pad with handwritten text. the text appears to be a script or notes related to "young people's concerts," specifically discussing the topic of "what is a mode?" the text includes references to "pencil," "yellow legal pad paper," "mimeo," "emendations in colored pencils," and "revised." the handwriting is somewhat formal and the text is organized in a structured manner, suggesting it could be a draft or a final version of a script. the background is plain and does not provide additional context.
